questionHtml:
Which factor influences the value of the pre-exponential factor, A, in the Arrhenius equation, k=Ae-EaRT?


A.  Nature of reactants

B.  Temperature of reaction

C.  Activation energy of reaction

D.  Overall order of the reaction
